creator: ronald-lists@klop.ws
text:
(In reply to Allan Jude from comment #26)
Thanks for your work.
It is a pity that all our patches are workarounds for the real issue. Why does the first probe of the disk fail? My wild guess is missing initialization needed on some hardware/BIOS. Because the parameters given to the IO routines are corrupted at first try, but ok afterwards. That's why there is an error about wrong LBA.
Maybe for bootcode the workaround in this issue is ok.
